items.title: Travelers Announces 2025 Personal Insurance Agent of the Year Award Honorees
items.description: HARTFORD, Conn., March 31, 2025--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced the 2025 Agent of the Year Award honorees, recognizing a select group of Personal Insurance independent agents for their outstanding customer service, dedication to their communities, long-term profitable growth and commitment to Travelers. Recipients were recently recognized at the Travelers annual leadership conference for top independent agents and brokers.
